response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with distributed systems, large-scale infrastructure, and software architecture, but his primary expertise lies in Node.js, JavaScript, and Dlang rather than C++. While he has C++ experience (National Instruments), it is not as prominent or recent as required. His leadership and mentoring experience is strong, but his cloud architecture and DevOps background is limited compared to the role's needs.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and large-scale infrastructure (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby, real-time metadata handling).
Proven technical leadership and mentoring experience (e.g., organizing workshops, TDD practices, and leading teams at Altom Consulting).
Diverse technical stack including C++, C, Java, and Dlang, demonstrating adaptability and depth in systems programming.
concerns: Limited recent and deep C++ experience (only 1 year at National Instruments, 6+ years ago). The role requires 8+ years of C++ programming.
Minimal cloud architecture experience (only AWS CDK mentioned, no production-level cloud infrastructure ownership).
No explicit experience with compute technologies, storage, or hardware architecture in a cloud context.
